arts.ttl: Barcelona vs Girona: Preview, predictions and lineups
arts.sum: Previewing Barcelona vs Girona in La Liga, with TV & live stream details, team news, predicted lineups & score prediction.

arts.ttl: Romeu has ‘small hope’ he can face Barca as Girona consider paying ‘fear clause’
arts.sum: Romeu spoke about the possibility of featuring on Sunday and hasn’t given up hope he could be involved. The midfielder was set to miss out due to a ‘fear clause’ in his loan deal, but Girona are said to be willing to pay a €300,000 fee which would allow Romeu to feature.

arts.ttl: Justin Kluivert makes Barcelona confession after career-changing Bournemouth season
arts.sum: INTERVIEW: Bournemouth star Justin Kluivert has enjoyed a remarkable 2025 to date but he wants his purple patch to continue as he targets a place in the FA Cup semi-finals with the Cherries

arts.ttl: Hansi Flick on Lamine Yamal’s chances of starting for Barcelona vs Girona
arts.sum: Barcelona head coach Hansi Flick has provided an insight into his plans for Lamine Yamal for the club’s next outing. Barcelona are of course primed to return to action on…

arts.ttl: Barcelona reach decision on Wojciech Szczesny’s future for next season
arts.sum: A major update on the future of Barcelona star Wojciech Szczesny has this weekend been forthcoming online. Szczęsny, for his part, has of course spent the last couple of months…

arts.ttl: Flick watches Barca Atletic end winless run by beating league leaders
arts.sum: Hansi Flick was in attendance on Saturday as Barcelona Atletic finally returned to winning ways by beating Cultural Leonesa. Alexis Olmedo - who’s been training with the first team - played in Jan Virgili to run through and beat the goalkeeper at his near post for his first Barcelona Atletic goal.

arts.ttl: Barcelona predicted lineup vs Girona - La Liga
arts.sum: Barcelona's predicted starting lineup for their upcoming La Liga clash against Girona on Sunday afternoon.

arts.ttl: Barcelona boss Hansi Flick addresses Osasuna appeal as La Liga leaders face devastating points deduction
arts.sum: Barcelona head coach Hansi Flick reacts the situation regarding Inigo Martinez and his potential ineligibility for Thursday's La Liga clash against Osasuna.

arts.ttl: Barcelona transfer news: Four-goal midfielder 'heading for Camp Nou exit' this summer
arts.sum: Barcelona midfielder Pablo Torre is allegedly set to leave Camp Nou on loan during this summer's transfer window.

arts.ttl: Man City transfer news: Barcelona beware as Pep Guardiola's side are plotting 'multi-million-dollar bid' for 'world's best midfielder'
arts.sum: Manchester City are reportedly plotting a 'multi-million-dollar offer' for a Barcelona star labelled "the best midfielder in the world" by Hansi Flick.
